text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (Granular) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is pixel live AND tier strategy already applied AND audience size 500K-2M target?

branch.question: Is daily budget ≥$100 AND product broad-appeal?

conclusion.verdict: Advantage+ enabled; dynamic creative on; OR-stack 2-3 themes
manual interest stacks; dynamic creative off

text.example: preconds met, niche B2B → manual interest stacks, dynamic creative off.
